name: Patient 4
history: Recent shoulder surgery with painful recovery. Ongoing pain from herniated cervical disc. History of physical therapy. New relationship followed by return of symptoms.
intermediate_belief: My body is broken and will always limit me.
intermediate_belief_depression: I am a burden to others and don't deserve to participate in normal life.
coping_strategies: Pushing through pain, minimizing symptoms, social withdrawal.
situation: Attending a Halloween party while in persistent pain.
auto_thought: "No one wants to hear about my pain. I'm ruining the mood. I should just stay home."
behavior: Hides pain with smiles, drinks alcohol to numb discomfort, leaves early without explanation.
